tutorialTopics.title: AI Tagging

slides.title: Generate reviewable tags
slides.caption: AI Tagging contributes tag claims that AI Core can request during scene and image runs.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Choose tagging claims in the run dialog, use settings to normalize generated tag names, then review the results in tagger and detail views before broad cleanup.
slides.imageAlt: AI Tagging generated tag claims review screen
